title: App Settings- General - Account - Invite to second tenant, UI
scenario: Verify that accepting one of two Lens account invites and declining the other correctly updates the invite list and maintains the accepted tenant info in the mobile app.
steps: Cloud Admin sends two different Lens account invites to the mobile user's email.
Launch the app, go to Poly Lens Menu > General > Account, and log in — two new invites should appear.
Accept one invite — accepted invite disappears, the other remains.
Go to Poly Lens Menu > Support > App — verify tenant info matches the accepted invite.
Go back to Account and Decline the remaining invite — it disappears.
Go to Support > App — verify tenant info is unchanged and still matches the accepted invite.
expected: User can accept one invite and the tenant info reflects the accepted invite. Declining the remaining invite does not change the tenant info.
